mapper.sql: id, analysis_job_id, run_id, rank_order, title, summary, category, stage, axis, severity, confidence, priority_score, impact_hypothesis, CAST(evidence_refs_jsonb AS TEXT) AS evidence_refs_jsonb, CAST(references_jsonb AS TEXT) AS references_jsonb, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM analysis_finding WHERE analysis_job_id = #{analysisJobId} ORDER BY rank_order ASC
SELECT FROM analysis_finding WHERE analysis_job_id = #{analysisJobId} ORDER BY priority_score DESC NULLS LAST, rank_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO analysis_finding ( id, analysis_job_id, run_id, rank_order, title, summary, category, stage, axis, severity, confidence, priority_score, impact_hypothesis, evidence_refs_jsonb, references_jsonb ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{analysisJobId}, #{runId}, #{rankOrder}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{category}, #{stage}, #{axis}, #{severity}, #{confidence}, #{priorityScore}, #{impactHypothesis}, CAST(#{evidenceRefsJsonb} AS jsonb), CAST(#{referencesJsonb} AS jsonb) )
